query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding in June–July 2026:

**Bottom line: No brand-new equity funding round was completed by any of the three companies within June–July 2026 itself. The only actively imminent/expected round is Mistral AI's.**

**OpenAI** — No new round in the window. Its last round ($122B at $852B post-money) closed March 31, 2026. June–July news was dominated by its IPO process: confidential S-1 filed June 8, then late-June reports of an IPO delay to 2027, which sent SoftBank shares down ~12.5% on June 26.

**Anthropic** — No new round in the window. Its $65B Series H at a $965B post-money valuation was announced May 28, 2026 (just before the window), making it the most valuable AI startup. It also confidentially filed for an IPO in early June; backer Menlo Ventures raised a $3B fund on June 23 on the strength of its Anthropic stake.

**Mistral AI** — The key "imminent round" story. On June 12, 2026, Bloomberg reported Mistral is in early talks to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B valuation — nearly double its September 2025 Series C (€1.7B at €11.7B, led by ASML). As of early July 2026, this round had **not** closed and had no announced lead investor.

Full prose report, structured data points, and sourced citations have been delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.

key_facts: OpenAI's last equity round ($122B committed capital, $852B post-money valuation) closed March 31, 2026; no new round in June-July 2026.
OpenAI filed a confidential S-1 with the SEC on June 8, 2026; in late June 2026 reports (NYT) said it postponed its IPO to 2027, sending SoftBank shares down ~12.5% on June 26.
Anthropic announced a $65B Series H at a $965B post-money valuation on May 28, 2026, surpassing OpenAI as the most valuable AI startup; co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia.

Anthropic had no new funding round in June-July 2026 but confidentially filed for an IPO (~early June 2026); backer Menlo Ventures raised a $3B fund on June 23, 2026 driven by its Anthropic stake (~$14B value).
Mistral AI is in early talks (reported by Bloomberg June 12, 2026) to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B valuation, nearly doubling its €11.7B September 2025 Series C.
As of early July 2026 (e.g., TechCrunch July 4 explainer), Mistral's ~€3B round had NOT closed and had no announced lead investor; it remains the only imminent/expected round among the three.
Mistral's prior round: €1.7B (~$2B) Series C at €11.7B post-money in September 2025, led by ASML (~€1.3B for ~11% stake), plus $830M bank debt financing in March 2026.
Estimated annualized revenue: OpenAI ~$25B (Feb 2026), Anthropic ~$47B (May 2026, up from ~$9B end-2025).
